title: eleocharis schenckii
intro: Eleocharis schenckii, also known as Schenck's spike-rush, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eleocharis schenckii include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Eleocharis schenckii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and poultices, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
